title: canthium coromandelicum
intro: Canthium coromandelicum, also known as the "Vilvah" or "Vilva" plant, is a medicinal plant native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. It is a shrub-like plant with various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. Canthium coromandelicum is typically prepared in herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments.
